title: Windows Remote Access Tool Detected
description: Detects installation or execution of remote access tools commonly abused by attackers. Tools like AnyDesk, TeamViewer, ngrok, and ScreenConnect provide persistent remote access that can bypass firewall rules.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*AnyDesk.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*TeamViewer.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*ngrok*' or 'Command Line' like '*ngrok.exe*')) or ('Process Name' like '*ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*rustdesk.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*AnyDesk*' or 'Command Line' like '*TeamViewer*' or 'Command Line' like '*ScreenConnect*' or 'Command Line' like '*RustDesk*')))
falsepositives: IT help desk using approved remote access software
